% docs/latex_theme/fonts.tex
\usepackage{fontspec}

\newcommand{\HBSetupFonts}{%
  % Main font (safe)
  \IfFontExistsTF{Times New Roman}{%
    \setmainfont{Times New Roman}%
  }{%
    \IfFontExistsTF{Calibri}{%
      \setmainfont{Calibri}%
    }{%
      \IfFontExistsTF{Latin Modern Roman}{%
        \setmainfont{Latin Modern Roman}%
      }{%
        \setmainfont{FreeSerif}%
      }%
    }%
  }%

  % Sans font (safe)
  \IfFontExistsTF{Arial}{%
    \setsansfont{Arial}%
  }{%
    \IfFontExistsTF{Calibri}{%
      \setsansfont{Calibri}%
    }{%
      \IfFontExistsTF{Latin Modern Sans}{%
        \setsansfont{Latin Modern Sans}%
      }{%
        \setsansfont{FreeSans}%
      }%
    }%
  }%

  % Mono font (safe)
  \IfFontExistsTF{Consolas}{%
    \setmonofont{Consolas}[Scale=MatchLowercase]%
  }{%
    \IfFontExistsTF{JetBrains Mono}{%
      \setmonofont{JetBrains Mono}[Scale=MatchLowercase]%
    }{%
      \IfFontExistsTF{Courier New}{%
        \setmonofont{Courier New}[Scale=MatchLowercase]%
      }{%
        \IfFontExistsTF{Latin Modern Mono}{%
          \setmonofont{Latin Modern Mono}[Scale=MatchLowercase]%
        }{%
          \setmonofont{FreeMono}[Scale=MatchLowercase]%
        }%
      }%
    }%
  }%
}

\AtBeginDocument{\HBSetupFonts}
